title: SSO login redirect fails for BPS accounts
description: Members using BPS SSO to log in are redirected to a blank page. Email/password login works. Likely a SameSite cookie issue on the SSO callback.
author: drusso-apush

title: Petition counter does not update in real time
description: After a member signs the contract petition, the counter on the campaign page requires a hard refresh to show the updated count. Backend records the signature correctly.
author: drusso-apush

title: Add Period 9 DBQ packet to product catalog
description: Periods 1-8 are in the shop. Period 9 (2001-present) is highly requested. Need to create the DBQ packet, upload to Etsy, and update repo docs.
author: drusso-apush

title: Generator outputs duplicate prompts for Period 4 when n>6
description: When requesting more than 6 prompts for Period 4, the generator starts repeating. The period_4_prompts list only has 6 entries. Need to expand or add fallback shuffle.
author: tsullivan-ebhs

title: Mobile nav menu does not close after link tap
description: On mobile, tapping a nav link navigates to the correct page but the hamburger menu stays open and overlaps content. Reproduced on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.
author: kmonteiro-beu

title: Add primary sources for 1919 Boston Police Strike
description: The labor history unit covers national strikes but misses the 1919 BPD strike, which is locally relevant. Add 3-4 primary sources and a discussion guide.
author: drusso-apush

title: Document download returns 403 for non-admin members
description: Regular members get a 403 on PDF downloads from the document library. Admin accounts work. Likely a role check bug in the S3 presigned URL lambda.
author: aperez-ebhs

title: Rate limiting too aggressive for whole-class use
description: When 28 students hit the API simultaneously from the same school IP, requests get 429 errors after ~10 seconds. Current limit is 20 req/min per IP. Classroom use needs at least 100.
author: tsullivan-ebhs

title: Bulk download ZIP bundle for Full Year purchase
description: Several Etsy buyers have requested a single ZIP of all unit packets. Would improve the value of the full-year bundle listing.
author: drusso-apush

title: CSV export missing outcome field for resolved grievances
description: When exporting to CSV, the outcome column is empty for all resolved grievances. The field populates in the UI but is not mapped in the serializer.
author: drusso-apush

title: Email notification when grievance status changes
description: Members should receive an email when their grievance moves from 'filed' to 'in review' or 'resolved'. Currently no notification exists.
author: drusso-apush

title: Timeline renders blank on Safari 16
description: The timeline visualization is blank on Safari 16. Dev tools show a CSS grid subgrid error. Need a flex-based fallback layout.
author: jcosta-ebhs

title: Blog RSS feed returns 500
description: The RSS feed at /feed.xml returns 500 since the June 1 deploy. A draft post has a null date field that the generator calls .toISOString() on.
author: drusso-apush

title: Grievance form missing Article 20 - Working Conditions category
description: The grievance form dropdown is missing the Article 20 Working Conditions option. Members filing hall duty or coverage disputes have to use 'Other' as a workaround.
author: drusso-apush

title: Update for 2025-26 season roster
description: Dashboard still has the 2024-25 roster. Update player IDs and stats endpoints to pull from the current season parameter.
author: drusso-apush

title: Dues reconciliation script fails on hyphenated names
description: The CSV reconciliation script throws a KeyError when parsing names with hyphens. Affects at least 4 chapter members. Need a name normalization step before matching.
author: drusso-apush

title: Add dark mode support
description: Several members have requested dark mode for evening portal use. CSS custom property approach would work without a full theme overhaul.
author: pbhatt-ebhs

title: Fix typo in Period 5 DBQ packet answer key
description: Page 8 says 'Compromise of 1850' where it should say 'Missouri Compromise'. Multiple Etsy buyers have flagged it. Need to push a corrected file.
author: drusso-apush

title: Add alt text to all historical photograph embeds
description: Lesson plan HTML files embed historical photos without alt text, failing WCAG 2.1 AA. Need descriptive alt text across all images in units 1-6.
author: drusso-apush

title: Add GitLab CI pipeline for portal infra terraform plan
description: Currently infra changes are applied manually. Adding a CI pipeline to run terraform plan on MR and terraform apply on main merge will reduce human error.
author: drusso-apush
